title: senecio matricariifolius
intro: Senecio matricariifolius, also known as burnet-sage, is a perennial herb in the daisy family native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a bitter and stimulate digestion, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of burnet-sage are said to include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Burnet-sage can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
